text: As I step through the corridor, the sterile clarity of the glass walls and the hush of empty chairs give me an odd sense of anticipation, as though I am crossing a threshold between mundane routine and the possibility of revelation. Entering the R+D room, vivid colors and softly glowing screens envelop me; the words on the wall resonate with a sense of thoughtful suspension between reality and artifice. I feel strangely tranquil, drawn into a meditative state by the interplay of light, technology, and speculative thought. Here, my mind wanders and wonders, poised delicately between observer and participant in this experimental space.
